description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with a predominantly white brick exterior and large, open balconies. The front facade showcases a two-story structure with a covered carport, a lush garden area, and a spacious terrace on the upper level. The upper floor includes a partially enclosed rooftop area with metal railings and a tiled floor, providing ample outdoor living space. Windows are arranged in vertical strips and small rectangular forms, contributing to a clean, geometric aesthetic. The main entryway is recessed beneath a covered porch supported by columns, with glass doors and railings enhancing the contemporary look. The overall structure is solid and substantial, with flat roof sections and minimal decorative detailing.
description: A modern, white brick house with flat roofs, open balconies, a carport, and a rooftop terrace. Features include vertical strip windows, metal railings, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the carport, garden, covered porch, glass railings, and main entryway.
description_view_1: Rear/side view highlighting the rooftop terrace, metal railings, and upper-level room with large windows.
description_view_2: Side view displaying vertical strip windows and the solid, unadorned brick wall.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a clear view of the flat roof and upper terrace.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips and small rectangular windows, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed covered porch with columns, glass doors, and a small garden area
